'''nomazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:loanable|loanable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-m-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loanable|loanable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nomazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nomazhithi|nomazhithi]] || [[word:nomazhiji|nomazhiji]] || [[word:nomazhishi|nomazhishi]] || [[word:nomazhiki|nomazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nomazhuthuthu|nomazhuthuthu]] || [[word:nomazhujuju|nomazhujuju]] || [[word:nomazhushushu|nomazhushushu]] || [[word:nomazhukuku|nomazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nomazhuthu|nomazhuthu]] || [[word:nomazhuju|nomazhuju]] || [[word:nomazhushu|nomazhushu]] || [[word:nomazhuku|nomazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nomazhufthuf|nomazhufthuf]] || [[word:nomazhufjuf|nomazhufjuf]] || [[word:nomazhufshuf|nomazhufshuf]] || [[word:nomazhufkuf|nomazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nomazhethe|nomazhethe]] || [[word:nomazheje|nomazheje]] || [[word:nomazheshe|nomazheshe]] || [[word:nomazheke|nomazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nomazhothotho|nomazhothotho]] || [[word:nomazhojojo|nomazhojojo]] || [[word:nomazhoshosho|nomazhoshosho]] || [[word:nomazhokoko|nomazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nomazhotho|nomazhotho]] || [[word:nomazhojo|nomazhojo]] || [[word:nomazhosho|nomazhosho]] || [[word:nomazhoko|nomazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nomazhofthof|nomazhofthof]] || [[word:nomazhofjof|nomazhofjof]] || [[word:nomazhofshof|nomazhofshof]] || [[word:nomazhofkof|nomazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nomazhĂŻfthĂŻf|nomazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nomazhĂŻfjĂŻf|nomazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nomazhĂŻfshĂŻf|nomazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nomazhĂŻfkĂŻf|nomazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nomazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|nomazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nomazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|nomazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nomazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|nomazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nomazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|nomazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nomazhĂŻfthĂŻf|nomazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nomazhĂŻfjĂŻf|nomazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nomazhĂŻfshĂŻf|nomazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nomazhĂŻfkĂŻf|nomazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nomazhĂŻfthĂŻf|nomazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:nomazhĂŻfjĂŻf|nomazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:nomazhĂŻfshĂŻf|nomazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:nomazhĂŻfkĂŻf|nomazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nomazhĂŠthĂŠ|nomazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:nomazhĂŠjĂŠ|nomazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:nomazhĂŠshĂŠ|nomazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:nomazhĂŠkĂŠ|nomazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nomazhathatha|nomazhathatha]] || [[word:nomazhajaja|nomazhajaja]] || [[word:nomazhashasha|nomazhashasha]] || [[word:nomazhakaka|nomazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nomazhatha|nomazhatha]] || [[word:nomazhaja|nomazhaja]] || [[word:nomazhasha|nomazhasha]] || [[word:nomazhaka|nomazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nomazhafthaf|nomazhafthaf]] || [[word:nomazhafjaf|nomazhafjaf]] || [[word:nomazhafshaf|nomazhafshaf]] || [[word:nomazhafkaf|nomazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nomazhasha|nomazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nomazhshĂ«sha|nomazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nomazhrosha|nomazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nomazhmusha|nomazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nomazhyasha|nomazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonomazhnkshĂ«sha|gonomazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonomazhnkrosha|gonomazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonomazhnkmusha|gonomazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonomazhnkyasha|gonomazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nomamazhasha|nomamazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nomamazhshĂ«sha|nomamazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nomamazhrosha|nomamazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nomamazhmusha|nomamazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nomamazhyasha|nomamazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonomamazhnkshĂ«sha|gonomamazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonomamazhnkrosha|gonomamazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonomamazhnkmusha|gonomamazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonomamazhnkyasha|gonomamazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nemĂŠzhasha|nemĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nemĂŠzhshĂ«sha|nemĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nemĂŠzhrosha|nemĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nemĂŠzhmusha|nemĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nemĂŠzhyasha|nemĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonemĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|gonemĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonemĂŠzhnkrosha|gonemĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonemĂŠzhnkmusha|gonemĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonemĂŠzhnkyasha|gonemĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nomfazhasha|nomfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nomfazhshĂ«sha|nomfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nomfazhrosha|nomfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nomfazhmusha|nomfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nomfazhyasha|nomfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonomfazhnkshĂ«sha|gonomfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonomfazhnkrosha|gonomfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonomfazhnkmusha|gonomfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonomfazhnkyasha|gonomfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
